headline: Middle East war threatens Bangladesh's migrant jobs - The Financial Express | First Financial Daily of Bangladesh
source: The Financial Express | First Financial Daily of Bangladesh
expected_effects: remittance channel disruption; trade route uncertainty; energy price volatility

title: Banking Sector Fragility
economic_mechanism: Rising non-performing loans, governance failures, or liquidity stress in banks constrain credit intermediation and erode depositor confidence.
headline: BB allows banks to offer loans against govt bonds - Bangladesh Sangbad Sangstha (BSS)
expected_effects: credit rationing; deposit flight risk; fiscal contingent liability

title: Monetary Policy Shift

expected_effects: higher borrowing costs; bond yield rise; investment dampening

title: External Liquidity Stress
economic_mechanism: Foreign exchange shortages constrain import financing, widen the informal premium, and force rationing of dollar-denominated obligations.
headline: Forex reserves stand at US$34.29b - Bangladesh Sangbad Sangstha (BSS)
expected_effects: import compression; industrial input shortage; informal FX premium widening
who_should_care: trade finance banks; importers; currency desks

title: Remittance Flow Disruption
economic_mechanism: Remittance slowdown reduces rural household income, weakens consumption demand, and tightens FX supply.
headline: 51.7pc growth of remittance inflow till March 10 - Bangladesh Sangbad Sangstha (BSS)
expected_effects: rural consumption slowdown; FX supply reduction; hundi channel widening
who_should_care: rural economy analysts; consumer sector; central bank

title: Export Demand Contraction
economic_mechanism: Weak external demand reduces factory utilization, compresses labor income, and lowers FX earnings.

expected_effects: lower manufacturing output; urban income slowdown; FX earnings pressure
